concerns.detail: Deleted text contains full name of PhD student 'jiageng mao' and identifying relationship details about specific students (e.g., romantic partner in another PhD program)
concerns.excerpt: 组里逆天phd jiageng mao没水平...该学生和Yue合作的一个四大phd是男女朋友

concerns.detail: Inserted personal insult attacking another editor as a robot/AI ('人机') and dismissing their contributions as mere trash-talking without evidence
concerns.excerpt: 那你可能要反思一下自己是不是个人机，看啥都是AI味，毕竟证据证据是拿不出的，只会嘴两句

concerns.detail: Massive deletion removes substantive allegations about advisors Jimeng Sun (student death, mass firings) and Chaowei Xiao (office detention, forced phone/computer checks) that appear to be legitimate critical observations, suggesting suppression rather than cleanup
concerns.excerpt: UIUC Jimeng Sun...逼死了学生...Johns Hopkins University，Chaowei Xiao...把学生关在办公室里要求查看学生电脑和手机
